title: Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
